title: DLL Name
text: DLL Name Name of the DLL file for this C component implementation. If specified, it is automatically loaded by Uniface when needed. Description Alternatively, you can specify the DLL in the [USER_3GL] section of your assignment file. For example: [USER_3GL] my3gl(function1,function2) other3gl.dll third3gl.dll /preload c:/my3gl/doit3gl(functionX) Copy Applies To Signature Implementation (C) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
